title: Katilon Ke Kaatil
subTitle: Traumatised by her murder of her husband and the abduction of her two sons, a woman spends her life looking for her family. Things take a turn when two men arrive at her house with a family heirloom.

title: Mukt
subTitle: Suyambulingam, a school drop-out but an intelligent man, acquires knowledge by watching movies. When a dark incident seems to ruin his family, he uses all his wits to protect them.

title: Baadshah
subTitle: An amateur detective, Raj, goes by the nickname of Baadshah. But this name soon causes a misunderstanding that lands him in the middle of a conspiracy to assassinate the chief minister of Goa.

title: Haqdaar
subTitle: Bhanu, an illiterate man, hits rock-bottom when his father rejects him and his girlfriend refuses to marry him. Fortunately, his salvation arrives in the form of Swapna, a woman from the city.

title: Dhadkan
subTitle: Anjali and Dev's love story faces a harsh twist when Anjali is forced to marry Ram. Years later, Dev returns to rekindle their romance, only to find that Anjali has grown to love her husband.

title: Khudgarz
subTitle: Sita raises her son, Bihari, and his friend Amar as her own and the two treat each other like brothers. However, Amar's father is not too fond of Bihari, and he tries to create a rift between the two.

title: Divya Shakti
subTitle: A young reporter, Prashant Verma, tired of injustice, bears witness to a murder case and wages war against Tau. But in the process, his life and family members get threatened.

title: Devta
subTitle: An ordinary taxi driver becomes part of a notorious gang through a twist of fate and takes on the role of a terrifying assassin.

title: Devta
subTitle: An ordinary taxi driver becomes part of a notorious gang through a twist of fate and takes on the role of a terrifying assassin.

title: Om Mangalam Mangalam
subTitle: A woman becomes mesmerised by a man's singing, unaware of his criminal side. However, when she loses her eyesight in a serious accident, he takes care of her and falls for her.

title: Chalte Chalte
subTitle: Geeta is admitted to a psychiatric hospital after her lover passes away tragically. Later, she gains her senses, only to find him alive and in love with another woman.

title: Yes Boss
subTitle: Rahul's boss, Siddharth, is a womaniser who exploits Rahul into helping him win over Seema. However, Rahul ends up falling for Seema and is torn between his career aspirations and her.

title: 15th August
subTitle: Nagpal kills Chaudhry and his son, Ram, a military officer. Chaudhry's second son, Vikram, vows to destroy Nagpal who is all set to become the Chief Minister on the upcoming Indian Independence Day.

title: Insaniyat
subTitle: Inspector Amar must unite two rival crime bosses from different religious backgrounds to fight terrorism. In the process, he discovers the personal cost of being an honest cop.

title: No Entry
subTitle: A gorgeous club dancer's ill-timed rendezvous opens up a Pandora's box of lies, absurdities and misunderstandings in the lives of three quirky couples.

title: Baazigar
subTitle: A cold-blooded killer with a vendetta charms a businessman's elder daughter and then kills her in a way that would make it seem like a case of suicide. He then plots to destroy the rest of the family.

title: Commando - A One Man Army
subTitle: Caught in the diplomatic crossfire between India and China, Captain Karan Dogra fights a harrowing battle for survival and makes a new enemy by rescuing a damsel in distress.

title: Commando - A One Man Army
subTitle: Caught in the diplomatic crossfire between India and China, Captain Karan Dogra fights a harrowing battle for survival and makes a new enemy by rescuing a damsel in distress.

title: Main Hoon Chalbaaz
subTitle: Gudumba Shankar falls in love with Gowri and finds out that she is being forced to marry Kumar Swamy, a gangster. Shankar must find a way to stop him and save Gowri.

title: Kaun Kare Kurbanie
subTitle: Arjun Singh, a police inspector, lives peacefully with his family in Mumbai, until an alarming case of harassment and murder turns his life upside down.

title: Aasman Se Ooncha
subTitle: Inspector Malik transfers to Mumbai along with his family and sets out on a mission to catch King, an underworld leader. However, a shocking revelation changes the course of their lives.

title: Shiva Shakti
subTitle: Shiva forms a close friendship with Shakti when he comes to the city to earn money for his sister Kusum's wedding. However, he later vows to kill Shakti when Kusum becomes pregnant with his child.

title: Main Tera Dushman
subTitle: When a Forest Officer, Kishan Srivastav, hinders the criminal activities of Thakur Dayalu, he is framed for murder and sent to jail. Later, Kishan escapes prison and tries to clear his name.

title: Eena Meena Deeka
subTitle: A bank robbery mix-up sets the scene for a crackbrained cat-and-mouse game involving a troubled culprit, a fresh-out-of-jail customer and a policeman's feisty daughter.

title: Bol Radha Bol
subTitle: While Kishen enjoys village life and romance with Radha, a sinister doppelganger plots. Upon returning home, he'll discover his identity and life stolen by this malevolent impostor.

title: China Gate
subTitle: Colonel Puri requests his former fellow army officers court-martialed in disgrace to redeem themselves by rescuing a village from Jageera, an evil bandit.
